text:
Created attachment 241751
patch for audio/libopenshot-audio

The update is combined with the release of OpenShot 3.1.1.
https://www.openshot.org/blog/2023/04/20/new_openshot_release_311/

This is just an update synchronized with multimedia/libopenshot.
There is no change in behavior.
